content: FASE 1: lib/format.js - helper humanizeSelection() para nombres reales (1X2, DC, Moneyline, Spread, Over/Under)
FASE 2: Aplicar humanizeSelection en MatchCard.jsx y MatchDetailPage.jsx
FASE 3: Backend - TrackIn acepta sport, /picks/track lo guarda en pick_tracking
FASE 4: Frontend MatchDetailPage - cargar /picks/today filtrado por sport correcto + pasar sport al track
FASE 5: lint + screenshot + testing agent E2E
